notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: GdpPipeline exposes CreateGdpPipeline, GetGdpPipeline, ListGdpPipelines, UpdateGdpPipeline, and DeleteGdpPipeline. The same SDK package also exposes ChangeGdpPipelineCompartment, PeerGdpPipeline, RotateGdpPipelineKeys, StartGdpPipeline, StopGdpPipeline, and service-local work-request helpers, but the reviewed controller-backed runtime publishes only the base CRUD mutation surface.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateGdpPipelineResponse, UpdateGdpPipelineResponse, and DeleteGdpPipelineResponse expose opc-work-request-id headers without returning a GdpPipeline body. The reviewed runtime therefore polls GetGdpWorkRequest, recovers the pipeline OCID from work-request resources, and rereads GetGdpPipeline before converging status or confirming delete.

Pinned OCI SDK contract: GdpPipeline lifecycle states are CREATING, UPDATING, ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETING, DELETED, FAILED, and NEEDS_ATTENTION. Repo-authored success is ACTIVE or INACTIVE, requeue covers CREATING and UPDATING, delete confirmation follows DELETING to DELETED or NotFound, and NEEDS_ATTENTION is terminal non-success.

Pinned provider facts: provider docs publish oci_gdp_gdp_pipeline as both a resource and singular data source plus oci_gdp_gdp_pipelines as the list data source. ListGdpPipelinesRequest filters by compartmentId, displayName, gdpPipelineId, and lifecycleState.

Repo-authored bind-versus-create and mutation policy stay explicit: pre-create reuse requires exact compartmentId, displayName, pipelineType, and peeringRegion with a follow-up GET that confirms bucketDetails, while only UpdateGdpPipelineDetails fields displayName, description, serviceLogGroupId, fileTypes, authorizationDetails, isFileOverrideInDestinationEnabled, isScanningEnabled, isChunkingEnabled, isApprovalNeeded, approvalKeyVaultId, freeformTags, and definedTags reconcile in place. The reviewed runtime publishes non-empty fileTypes replacements but does not claim zero-length fileTypes clears because the pinned SDK update request omits empty slices on the wire.
